result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  Piral.Blazor.Analyzer [options]

Options:
  --base-dir <base-dir>                  baseDir
  --dll-name <dll-name>                  dllName
  --target-framework <target-framework>  targetFramework
  --configuration <configuration>        configuration [default: Debug]
  --version                              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
